title: space_set: name/description patch entries hit apply_member_patch and return invalidPatch
description: In space_set(), the update loop first extracts new_name and new_desc from patch_map, calls store.update_space_props if either is present, then iterates ALL of patch_map through apply_member_patch. Any 'name' or 'description' key that doesn't start with 'members/' returns Err(invalidPatch), setting update_err and landing the space in notUpdated. Result: sending {"name": "Foo"} as a patch (1) correctly writes the new name to the store, but (2) returns notUpdated with type:invalidPatch to the client — a partial write with a false error. Fix: skip 'name' and 'description' keys in the apply_member_patch loop since they are already handled by update_space_props above.
close_reason: Fixed: skip 'name' and 'description' in apply_member_patch loop. Regression test test_space_set_update_name_succeeds added and passing.
